examples: Discharge of 166 units of hypothalamic arcuate nucleus (arc) area was recorded extracellularly in 75 immobilized rats.
Single unit discharge of the dorsal hippocampus (HPC) CA1 area was recorded extracellularly by the glass microelectrode.
Spermine was added extracellularly to the bath before anoxia and spermine, spermidine or putrescine was added extracellularly after reoxygenation.
